_meta: Chinese source string → English. Missing keys fall back to Chinese.
按功能分组打开页面，并选择哪些入口固定在顶栏: Open pages grouped by function; choose which entries stay pinned in the top bar
新建一个项目工作区目录: Create a new project workspace folder
打开已有项目工作区目录: Open an existing project workspace folder
开始填写新标本唯一编号: Start a new specimen unique ID
语言切换将在重启后完全生效。: Language change takes full effect after restart.
切换后立即生效，并在下次启动时保持: Applies immediately and is kept for the next launch
保留当前风格，同时提供两套新设计用于对比整体观感。: Keep the current style, with two additional designs available for comparison.
性能模式（关闭卡片阴影与背景渐变）: Performance mode (disable card shadows and background gradients)
远程桌面/低性能环境下减少重绘，操作更顺滑；重启后生效。: Reduces repainting on remote desktop or low-performance systems; takes effect after restart.
远程控制 Linux 卡顿时建议开启；界面会变扁平，重启生效。: Recommended when Linux remote control feels slow; the interface becomes flatter after restart.
选择全局字体，立即生效并在下次启动保持；未安装字体会按系统回退: Choose the global font; applies immediately and falls back through the system if unavailable.
常用中文字体和 Times 等字体固定列在前面；未安装字体会自动回退。: Common CJK fonts and Times are listed first; unavailable fonts fall back automatically.
区域截图快捷键，默认 Alt+A；改动立即生效，系统级全局（后台也可触发）: Region capture shortcut, default Alt+A; changes apply immediately and work system-wide.
提示：未安装 pynput，截图快捷键仅在本软件窗口前台时可用；安装 pynpu: pynput is not installed, so screenshot shortcuts only work while this app is focused. Install pynput for system-wide shortcuts (pip install pynput).
录制快捷键：点击输入框后按下组合键。留空使用默认值。: Record a shortcut by clicking the field and pressing a key combination. Leave empty to use the default.
使用后端真实压缩（文件需实际存在于项目目录）: Use real backend compression (files must actually exist in the project directory)
对应 web useRealCompression 调试开关。关闭时系统只模拟压: Matches the web useRealCompression debug switch. When off, compression status is simulated and cjxl / archiver are not called.
导入一份含拉丁学名的表格，用 WoRMS 的 TAXAMATCH 算法批量匹配。: Import a table of Latin names and batch-match them with the WoRMS TAXAMATCH algorithm. All original columns are kept; tick below to append WoRMS columns.
「完整分类链」勾选时会为每个已接受名额外查一次 WoRMS（有缓存，冷启动稍慢）: Ticking "Classification" fetches WoRMS once per accepted name (cached; first run is slower).
双击任意行可在候选中选择 / 标记无匹配。: Double-click a row to pick a candidate / mark as no match.
待匹配 {} 个名称（去重 {} 个） / 共 {} 行: To match: {} names ({} unique) / {} rows total
没有可采用的候选。可点「标记为无匹配」。: No candidate to adopt. Use "Mark as no match".
请先选择「学名列」。: Please choose a name column first.
选中的列没有任何学名。: The selected column has no names.
请至少勾选一个要追加的 WoRMS 列。: Tick at least one WoRMS column to append.
该目录所在磁盘未挂载或路径不可用：: The disk for this folder is not mounted or the path is unavailable:
